hero.title: Discover the World With Us

howItWorks.title: How to travel for free?
howItWorks.heading: Travel
howItWorks.description: Share experiences and earn points towards real trips. No hidden conditions — everything is crystal clear.

step1.title: Share your link
step1.desc: Create an account and send your unique referral link to friends.

step2.title: Friends book
step2.desc: For every paid booking from a friend you earn bonuses directly to your account.

step3.title: Head to the beach
step3.desc: Accumulate points and choose any tour from our catalogue absolutely free.

testimonials.title: Moments
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from those who have already discovered a new level of travel. Over 12,000 happy travellers trust us with their holidays.
testimonials.item0text: I spent 10 days in Bali — everything was organised impeccably. The manager answered all my questions within 20 minutes. Already planning my next trip!
testimonials.item1text: Thanks to the referral programme I accumulated points and got a trip to the Maldives for free. It's simply incredible — I recommend it to everyone!
testimonials.item2text: A travel agency with real prices and no hidden fees. The manager is available around the clock. I'll definitely be coming back.
testimonials.item3text: The holiday in Turkey exceeded all expectations. 5-star hotel, all inclusive, transfers perfectly arranged. Thanks to the whole team!

chat.title: Personalised tour selection
chat.subtitle: No long searching. Just tell us where you want to go and we'll arrange everything in 15 minutes.
chat.msg1: We'd love Bali for two, budget $2000 🌴
chat.msg2: Great choice! I found 3 stunning villas. Sending the options now ✈️

loyalty.title: Travel
loyalty.subtitle: Invite friends via your personal link and earn bonuses from their bookings. Accumulate enough bonuses and head to the beach on us!

wishlist.title: Wishlist
wishlist.subtitle: Saved tours — we'll notify you when the price drops
wishlist.priceDropBanner: Price dropped on {count, plural, one {# tour} other {# tours}}!
wishlist.emptyDesc: Click ♡ on any tour to save it here. We'll notify you if the price drops.

newsletter.title: Get hot deals first
newsletter.subtitle: Once a week. Only the best, no spam.

footer.brandDesc: Book the best tours, travel with friends and earn free trips through our referral programme.
